$connectionId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['online', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('online').val() === true && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').val() <= now + 10000

$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && newData.exists() && (!data.exists() || newData.child('score').val() >= data.child('score').val())
$uid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['nickname', 'score', 'completedRounds', 'misses', 'totalTimeMs', 'completedAt', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 1 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 12 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 1 && newData.child('score').val() <= 10000000 && newData.child('completedRounds').isNumber() && newData.child('completedRounds').val() >= 1 && newData.child('completedRounds').val() <= 1000 && newData.child('misses').isNumber() && newData.child('misses').val() >= 0 && newData.child('misses').val() <= 10 && newData.child('totalTimeMs').isNumber() && newData.child('totalTimeMs').val() >= 1000 && newData.child('totalTimeMs').val() <= 86400000 && newData.child('completedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('completedAt').val() <= now + 10000 && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').val() <= now + 10000
